meaning_th: หนึ่ง (คำนำหน้านามนับได้เอกพจน์ที่ไม่ชี้เฉพาะ)
meaning_en: used before countable singular nouns
examples: I saw an elephant at the zoo.

meaning_th: เกี่ยวกับ
meaning_en: connected with a subject
examples: This book is about animals.

meaning_th: ข้างบน, เหนือ
meaning_en: in or to a higher place than something else
examples: The birds are flying above the clouds.

meaning_th: ข้าม, จากอีกฝั่งหนึ่งไปยังอีกฝั่งหนึ่ง
meaning_en: from one side to the other side
examples: He walked across the street.

meaning_th: การกระทำ, การปฏิบัติ, ฉากแอคชั่น
meaning_en: the process of doing something
examples: Deeds are better than words, so let's take action.

meaning_th: กิจกรรม
meaning_en: a thing that a person or group does or has done
examples: The school offers many after-school activities.

meaning_th: นักแสดงชาย
meaning_en: a person who performs in a play or movie
examples: He wants to be a famous actor.

meaning_th: นักแสดงหญิง
meaning_en: a woman who performs in a play or movie
examples: She is a very talented actress.

meaning_th: เพิ่ม, บวก
meaning_en: join something to something else so as to increase the size, number, or amount
examples: Please add some sugar to my coffee.

meaning_th: ที่อยู่
meaning_en: the particulars of the place where someone lives or an organization is situated
examples: Please write your name and address here.

meaning_th: ผู้ใหญ่
meaning_en: a person who is fully grown or developed
examples: Children must be accompanied by an adult.

meaning_th: คำแนะนำ
meaning_en: guidance or recommendations offered with regard to prudent future action
examples: Can you give me some advice about buying a car?

meaning_th: กลัว
meaning_en: feeling fear or anxiety; frightened
examples: Don't be afraid of the dog; it's friendly.

meaning_th: หลังจาก, หลัง
meaning_en: during the period of time following an event
examples: We went for a walk after dinner.

meaning_th: ตอนบ่าย, ช่วงบ่าย
meaning_en: the time from noon or lunchtime until evening
pronounce_th: อาฟเทอะนูน
examples: I will see you tomorrow afternoon.

meaning_th: อีกครั้ง, อีกที
meaning_en: another time; once more
examples: Could you say that again, please?

meaning_th: อายุ, ยุคสมัย
meaning_en: the length of time that a person or thing has existed
examples: He started school at the age of five.

meaning_th: มาแล้ว, ล่วงมาแล้ว (ใช้บอกเวลาในอดีต)
meaning_en: before the present; in the past
examples: I finished my homework ten minutes ago.

meaning_th: เห็นด้วย, ตกลง
meaning_en: have the same opinion about something
examples: I agree with your opinion.

meaning_th: อากาศ
meaning_en: the invisible gaseous substance surrounding the earth
examples: Let's go outside and get some fresh air.

meaning_th: สนามบิน
meaning_en: a complex of runways and buildings for the take-off, landing, and maintenance of civil aircraft
examples: We arrived at the airport two hours before our flight.

meaning_th: ทั้งหมด, ทุกคน, ทุกสิ่ง
meaning_en: used to refer to the whole quantity or extent of a particular group or thing
examples: All the students passed the English exam.

meaning_th: ด้วย, เช่นเดียวกัน, อีกด้วย
meaning_en: in addition; too
examples: She speaks French and she also speaks Spanish.

meaning_th: เสมอ, เป็นประจำ, ตลอดเวลา
meaning_en: at all times; on all occasions
examples: I always drink milk before going to bed.

meaning_th: น่าทึ่ง, มหัศจญ์, ประหลาดใจมาก
meaning_en: causing great surprise or wonder
examples: The view from the top of the mountain is amazing.

meaning_th: และ
meaning_en: used to connect words of the same part of speech, clauses, or sentences
examples: I bought an apple and a banana.

meaning_th: โกรธ
meaning_en: feeling or showing strong annoyance, displeasure, or hostility
examples: He was angry with me for being late.

meaning_th: สัตว์
meaning_en: a living organism that feeds on organic matter
examples: A lion is a wild animal.

meaning_th: อีกหนึ่ง, อื่นอีก
meaning_en: used to refer to an additional person or thing of the same type
examples: Would you like another cup of tea?

meaning_th: คำตอบ, ตอบ
meaning_en: a thing said, written, or done to deal with or as a reaction to a question or situation
examples: Please answer the question.
I don't know the answer.

meaning_th: บ้างไหม, เลย (ใช้ในประโยคคำถามและปฏิเสธ)
meaning_en: used to refer to one or some of a thing or number of things, no matter how much or many
examples: Do you have any questions?
I don't have any money left.

meaning_th: สิ่งใดๆ, อะไรก็ตาม
meaning_en: used to refer to a thing, no matter what
examples: Is there anything in the box?
I didn't eat anything this morning.

meaning_th: อพาร์ตเมนต์, ห้องชุด
meaning_en: a suite of rooms forming one residence, typically in a building containing more than one
pronounce_th: อะพาร์ตเมินท์
examples: They live in a small apartment in Bangkok.

meaning_th: แอปเปิ้ล
meaning_en: the round fruit of a tree of the rose family, which typically has thin green or red skin
examples: She ate a red apple for breakfast.

meaning_th: เมษายน
meaning_en: the fourth month of the year, in the northern hemisphere usually considered the second month of spring
examples: Songkran festival is in April.

meaning_th: พื้นที่, บริเวณ
meaning_en: a region or part of a town, a country, or the world
examples: There is a children's play area in the park.

meaning_th: แขน
meaning_en: each of the two upper limbs of the human body from the shoulder to the hand
examples: He broke his left arm during the football match.

meaning_th: รอบๆ, ประมาณ
meaning_en: located or moving on all sides of; approximately
examples: The earth moves around the sun.
I will meet you at around 5 o'clock.

meaning_th: มาถึง, ถึง
meaning_en: reach a place at the end of a journey or a stage in a journey
examples: The train will arrive at the station soon.

meaning_th: ศิลปะ
meaning_en: the expression or application of human creative skill and imagination
examples: She loves painting and art history.

meaning_th: บทความ
meaning_en: a piece of writing included with others in a newspaper, magazine, or other publication
pronounce_th: อาร์ทิเคิล
examples: I read an interesting article about technology today.

meaning_th: ศิลปิน
meaning_en: a person who creates paintings or drawings as a profession or hobby
examples: Van Gogh is a world-famous artist.

meaning_th: เช่นเดียวกับ, ในขณะที่, เพราะว่า, ในฐานะ
meaning_en: used to refer to the function or character that someone or something has; because; while
examples: She works as a teacher.
As it was raining, we stayed indoors.

meaning_th: ถาม, ขอร้อง
meaning_en: say something in order to obtain information or a reply
examples: Can I ask you a question?

meaning_th: ที่ (ระบุเวลาหรือสถานที่)
meaning_en: expressing location or arrival in a particular place or position; expressing the time when an event takes place
examples: I am at the office.
The meeting starts at 9 o'clock.

meaning_th: สิงหาคม
meaning_en: the eighth month of the year
examples: My school starts in August.

meaning_th: ฤดูใบไม้ร่วง
meaning_en: the season after summer and before winter, in which leaves fall from trees
examples: The leaves turn yellow and red in autumn.

meaning_th: ไปที่อื่น, ออกไป, ห่างออกไป
meaning_en: to or at a distance from a particular place, person, or thing
examples: Go away! I am busy right now.
The station is two miles away.

meaning_th: ทารก, เด็กอ่อน
meaning_en: a very young child or animal
examples: The baby is sleeping soundly in the crib.

meaning_th: หลัง, ด้านหลัง, กลับคืน
meaning_en: the rear surface of the human body from the shoulders to the hips; return to an earlier situation or position
examples: He hurt his back while lifting the box.
When will you come back?

meaning_th: เลว, ไม่ดี, แย่
meaning_en: of poor quality; not good
examples: Smoking is a bad habit.

meaning_th: กระเป๋า, ถุง
meaning_en: a flexible container with an opening at the top, used for carrying things
examples: Put your books inside your bag.

meaning_th: ลูกบอล, ลูกกลมๆ
meaning_en: a solid or hollow spherical or egg-shaped object used in a game
examples: The children are kicking a ball in the yard.

meaning_th: กล้วย
meaning_en: a long curved fruit which grows in clusters and has soft pulpy flesh and yellow skin when ripe
examples: Monkeys love eating bananas.

meaning_th: วงดนตรี, แถบรัด
meaning_en: a small group of musicians and vocalists who play music together
examples: He plays guitar in a rock band.

meaning_th: ธนาคาร, ตลิ่ง (ฝั่งแม่น้ำ)
meaning_en: a financial establishment that invests money deposited by customers
examples: I need to go to the bank to deposit some money.

meaning_th: การอาบน้ำ (แบบแช่อ่าง), อ่างอาบน้ำ
meaning_en: an act of washing the body in a large container of water
examples: I like to take a warm bath after a long work day.

meaning_th: ห้องน้ำ
meaning_en: a room containing a toilet and tub or shower
examples: Excuse me, where is the bathroom?

meaning_th: เป็น, อยู่, คือ
meaning_en: exist; occur; take place (used as an auxiliary verb or linking verb)
examples: I want to be a doctor when I grow up.
She is a good student.

meaning_th: ชายหาด, ชายทะเล
meaning_en: a pebbly or sandy shore, especially by the ocean or a lake
examples: We built a sandcastle on the beach.

meaning_th: สวย, งดงาม
meaning_en: pleasing the senses or mind aesthetically
examples: The flowers in the garden are very beautiful.

meaning_th: เพราะว่า
meaning_en: for the reason that; since
examples: I stayed at home because it was raining.

meaning_th: กลายเป็น, เปลี่ยนเป็น
meaning_en: begin to be; grow to be
examples: He wants to become a doctor in the future.

meaning_th: เตียง, เตียงนอน
meaning_en: a piece of furniture for sleep or rest
examples: It's late, time to go to bed.

meaning_th: ห้องนอน
meaning_en: a room for sleeping in
examples: My bedroom has a big window.

meaning_th: เบียร์
meaning_en: an alcoholic drink made from yeast-fermented malt flavored with hops
examples: He drank a glass of cold beer.

meaning_th: ก่อน, ก่อนหน้า
meaning_en: during the period of time preceding a particular event or time
examples: Wash your hands before eating.

meaning_th: เริ่ม, เริ่มต้น
meaning_en: start; perform the first part of an action
examples: The movie will begin at 8 p.m.

meaning_th: การเริ่มต้น, จุดเริ่มต้น
meaning_en: the point in time or space at which something starts
examples: I missed the beginning of the story.

meaning_th: ข้างหลัง, ด้านหลัง
meaning_en: at or to the far side of something; further back than
examples: The cat is hiding behind the sofa.

meaning_th: เชื่อ, ศรัทธา
meaning_en: accept something as true; feel sure of the truth of
examples: I believe that honesty is important.

meaning_th: ข้างล่าง, ต่ำกว่า
meaning_en: at a lower level or layer than
examples: Please read the sentences below.

meaning_th: ดีที่สุด
meaning_en: of the most excellent, effective, or desirable type or quality
examples: This is the best pizza I have ever eaten.

meaning_th: ดีกว่า
meaning_en: more excellent or effective than something else
examples: Your English is getting much better.

meaning_th: ระหว่าง
meaning_en: in or into the space separating two objects or people
examples: The library is between the school and the bank.

meaning_th: จักรยาน
meaning_en: a vehicle consisting of two wheels held in a frame one behind the other, propelled by pedals
examples: He rides his bicycle to school every morning.

meaning_th: ใหญ่, โต
meaning_en: of considerable size, extent, or intensity
examples: They live in a big house.

meaning_th: จักรยาน, มอเตอร์ไซค์
meaning_en: a bicycle or motorcycle
examples: Can I borrow your bike?

meaning_th: นก
meaning_en: a warm-blooded egg-laying vertebrate distinguished by the possession of feathers, wings, and a beak
examples: A small bird is singing in the tree.

meaning_th: วันเกิด
meaning_en: the anniversary of the day on which a person was born
pronounce_th: เบิร์ธเดย์
examples: Happy birthday! I bought a gift for you.

meaning_th: ขนมปังกรอบ, บิสกิต
meaning_en: a small, flat, crisp baked cake, typically sweetened
examples: I usually have a biscuit with my afternoon tea.

meaning_th: สีดำ
meaning_en: of the very darkest color owing to the absence of or complete absorption of light
examples: She loves wearing black clothes.

meaning_th: บล็อก, เว็บไซต์บันทึกส่วนตัว
meaning_en: a regularly updated website or web page, typically one run by an individual or small group
examples: He writes a travel blog about his journeys.

meaning_th: บลอนด์, สีทอง (มักใช้กับสีผม)
meaning_en: of a hair color that is light-colored, yellowish, or golden
examples: She has long blonde hair and blue eyes.

meaning_th: สีน้ำเงิน, สีฟ้า
meaning_en: of a color intermediate between green and violet, as of the sky on a clear day
examples: The sky is bright blue today.

meaning_th: เรือ, เรือขนาดเล็ก
meaning_en: a small vessel for traveling over water
examples: We took a boat to cross the river.

meaning_th: หนังสือ, จอง (ห้อง, ตั๋ว)
meaning_en: a written or printed work consisting of pages glued or sewn together along one side; reserve accommodations or a ticket
examples: I am reading an English book.
You should book your flight in advance.

meaning_th: รองเท้าบูท, พื้นที่เก็บของท้ายรถ
meaning_en: a sturdy item of footwear covering the foot and the ankle; a space at the back of a car for carrying luggage
examples: She wore leather boots in the winter.
Put the grocery bags in the boot of the car.

meaning_th: เบื่อ, รู้สึกเบื่อ
meaning_en: feeling weary and restless through lack of interest
examples: I'm bored with this movie; let's watch something else.

meaning_th: น่าเบื่อ
meaning_en: not interesting; tedious
examples: The lecture was so boring that I almost fell asleep.

meaning_th: เกิด, กำเนิด
meaning_en: existing as a result of birth
examples: I was born in Bangkok in 1995.

meaning_th: ทั้งสอง, ทั้งคู่
meaning_en: used for referring to two people or things together
examples: Both of his brothers are engineers.

meaning_th: ขวด
meaning_en: a glass or plastic container with a narrow neck, used for storing drinks
examples: Can I have a bottle of water, please?

meaning_th: กล่อง
meaning_en: a container with a flat base and sides, typically square or rectangular and having a lid
examples: He put all his toys into a cardboard box.

meaning_th: เด็กผู้ชาย
meaning_en: a male child or youth
examples: The little boy is playing with a toy car.

meaning_th: ขนมปัง
meaning_en: food made of flour, water, and yeast mixed together and baked
examples: I love the smell of fresh bread from the bakery.

meaning_th: ทำแตก, หัก, ช่วงเวลาพัก
meaning_en: separate into pieces as a result of a blow, shock, or strain; an interruption of continuity or a short rest
examples: Be careful not to break that mirror.
Let's take a 10-minute break.

meaning_th: อาหารเช้า
meaning_en: the first meal of the day, especially when taken in the morning
examples: What did you eat for breakfast today?

meaning_th: นำมา, เอามาให้
meaning_en: take or go with someone or something to a place
examples: Please bring your umbrella with you; it might rain.

meaning_th: พี่ชาย, น้องชาย
meaning_en: a man or boy in relation to other sons and daughters of his parents
examples: My older brother is a university student.

meaning_th: สีน้ำตาล
meaning_en: of a color produced by mixing red, yellow, and black, as of dark wood or rich soil
examples: The dog has beautiful brown fur.

meaning_th: สร้าง, ก่อสร้าง
meaning_en: construct something by putting parts or materials together
examples: They plan to build a new school here next year.

meaning_th: อาคาร, ตึก
meaning_en: a structure with a roof and walls, such as a house, school, or factory
examples: That tall building is the town hall.

meaning_th: รถโดยสารประจำทาง, รถบัส
meaning_en: a large motor vehicle carrying passengers by road, especially one serving the public
examples: I catch the bus to work every morning.

meaning_th: ธุรกิจ, การค้า, กิจการ
meaning_en: the practice of making one's living by engaging in commerce
examples: She wants to start her own clothing business.

meaning_th: ยุ่ง, ไม่ว่าง, มีงานมาก
meaning_en: having a great deal to do; occupied with activity
examples: The doctor is very busy with patients right now.

meaning_th: แต่, แต่ว่า
meaning_en: used to introduce a phrase or clause contrasting with what has already been said
examples: I love tea, but I don't like coffee.

meaning_th: เนย, เนยเหลว
meaning_en: a pale yellow fatty substance made by churning cream
examples: Spread some butter on your toast.

meaning_th: ซื้อ
meaning_en: obtain in exchange for payment
examples: Where can I buy a ticket for the concert?

meaning_th: โดย, ข้างๆ, ด้วย (บอกวิธีการหรือสถานที่)
meaning_en: identifying the agent performing an action; near or next to
examples: This book was written by a famous author.
She sat down by the window.

meaning_th: คาเฟ่, ร้านกาแฟ
meaning_en: a small restaurant selling light meals and drinks
examples: Let's meet at the cafe down the street.

meaning_th: เค้ก
meaning_en: an item of soft, sweet food made from a baked mixture of flour, fat, eggs, and sugar
examples: She baked a delicious chocolate cake for my birthday.

meaning_th: โทรหา, เรียก, ขานชื่อ
meaning_en: cry out to someone in order to catch their attention; make a phone call
examples: Please call me when you arrive home.
I received a phone call from my mother.

meaning_th: กล้องถ่ายรูป, กล้องวิดีโอ
meaning_en: a device for recording visual images in the form of photographs, film, or video signals
examples: He took a picture of the bird with his new camera.

meaning_th: ค่าย, ตั้งค่าย, พักแรม
meaning_en: a place where an army or other group of people is lodged in an organized body of tents or temporary buildings
examples: We decided to camp near the lake for the weekend.

meaning_th: การตั้งแคมป์, การพักแรม
meaning_en: the activity of spending a holiday living in a tent
examples: Camping is a great way to enjoy nature.

meaning_th: สามารถ, ทำได้, กระป๋อง
meaning_en: be able to; used to identify a container or cylinder for preserving food or drink
examples: She can speak three languages fluently.
He drank a can of soda.

meaning_th: ไม่สามารถ, ไม่ได้
meaning_en: not able to; the negative form of 'can'
examples: I cannot swim very well.

meaning_th: เมืองหลวง, อักษรตัวพิมพ์ใหญ่, เงินทุน
meaning_en: the most important city or town of a country or region; large letter
examples: Bangkok is the capital city of Thailand.
Please write your name in capital letters.

meaning_th: รถยนต์
meaning_en: a road vehicle, typically with four wheels, powered by an internal combustion engine
examples: He drives a red car to work.

meaning_th: บัตร, การ์ด, ไพ่
meaning_en: a piece of thick, stiff paper or thin pasteboard, typically rectangular, used for writing or printing on
examples: He paid for the dinner with a credit card.

meaning_th: อาชีพ, สายงาน
meaning_en: an occupation undertaken for a significant period of a person's life and with opportunities for progress
examples: She is looking for a career in marketing.

meaning_th: แครอท
meaning_en: a tapering orange-colored root eaten as a vegetable
examples: Carrots are good for your eyesight.

meaning_th: ถือ, แบก, หิ้ว, พกพา
meaning_en: support and move someone or something from one place to another
examples: Could you help me carry these heavy bags?

meaning_th: แมว
meaning_en: a small domesticated carnivorous mammal with soft fur
examples: The cat is sleeping on the sofa.

meaning_th: ซีดี, แผ่นซีดี
meaning_en: a compact disc
examples: I bought a music CD of my favorite band.

meaning_th: เซนต์ (หน่วยเงินตรา)
meaning_en: a monetary unit in various countries, equal to one hundredth of a dollar, euro, or other decimal currency
examples: A dollar has one hundred cents.

meaning_th: ศูนย์กลาง, ใจกลาง
meaning_en: the point that is equally distant from every point on the circumference of a circle or sphere
examples: We live in the town centre.

meaning_th: ศตวรรษ, รอบหนึ่งร้อยปี
meaning_en: a period of one hundred years
examples: We are living in the 21st century.

meaning_th: เก้าอี้
meaning_en: a separate seat for one person, typically with a back and four legs
examples: Please take a chair and sit down.

meaning_th: เปลี่ยนแปลง, แลกเปลี่ยน, เงินทอน
meaning_en: make or become different; take or use another instead of
examples: The weather can change quickly in autumn.
Don't forget your change at the shop.

meaning_th: แผนภูมิ, ตาราง
meaning_en: a sheet of information in the form of a table, graph, or diagram
examples: The sales chart shows a big increase this month.

meaning_th: ราคาถูก
meaning_en: low in price, especially in relation to similar items or services
examples: This restaurant serves cheap and delicious food.

meaning_th: ตรวจสอบ, ตรวจเช็ค
meaning_en: examine something in order to determine its accuracy, quality, or condition
examples: Please check your answers before submitting the test.

meaning_th: ชีส, เนยแข็ง
meaning_en: a food made from the pressed curds of milk
examples: I love extra cheese on my pizza.

meaning_th: ไก่, เนื้อไก่
meaning_en: a domestic fowl kept for its eggs or meat; the meat of this bird
examples: We are having fried chicken for dinner.

meaning_th: เด็ก, ลูก
meaning_en: a young human being below the age of puberty or full legal age
examples: The child is playing with a toy car.

meaning_th: ช็อกโกแลต
meaning_en: a food in the form of a paste or solid block made from roasted and ground cacao seeds
examples: She bought a bar of dark chocolate.

meaning_th: เลือก
meaning_en: pick out or select someone or something as being the best or most appropriate of two or more alternatives
examples: You can choose which book you want to read.

meaning_th: โรงภาพยนตร์
meaning_en: a theater where movies are shown for public entertainment
examples: Let's go to the cinema tonight.

meaning_th: เมือง, นคร
meaning_en: a large town
examples: New York is a famous and very busy city.

meaning_th: ชั้นเรียน, ห้องเรียน
meaning_en: a group of students who are taught together
examples: What time does your English class start?

meaning_th: ห้องเรียน (สถานที่)
meaning_en: a room in a school in which classes are held
examples: There is a computer in every classroom.

meaning_th: สะอาด, ทำความสะอาด
meaning_en: free from dirt, marks, or stains; make clean
examples: Please make sure your hands are clean.
I need to clean my bedroom this weekend.

meaning_th: ปีน, ไต่
meaning_en: go up or climb towards the top of a mountain, tree, or ladder
examples: The boys like to climb trees in the park.

meaning_en: combustion or burning, in which substances combine chemically with oxygen from the air and typically give out bright light and heat
examples: Don't play with fire; it is very dangerous.

meaning_th: อันดับแรก, ที่หนึ่ง, แรกสุด
meaning_en: coming before all others in time or order
examples: January is the first month of the year.
First, wash your hands before eating.

meaning_th: ปลา, เนื้อปลา
meaning_en: a limbless cold-blooded vertebrate animal with gills and fins and living wholly in water
examples: There are many colorful fish in the river.

meaning_th: ห้า, เลขห้า
meaning_en: one more than four; half of ten
examples: I have five English books in my bag.

meaning_th: แฟลต, ห้องชุด, แบนราบ
meaning_en: a suite of rooms on one floor forming a separate residence; having a level surface
examples: They live in a modern flat in London.

meaning_th: เที่ยวบิน, การบิน
meaning_en: an act of flying; a journey made through the air
examples: Our flight to Bangkok departs from the airport soon.

meaning_th: พื้นห้อง, ชั้น (ของตึก)
meaning_en: the lower surface of a room, on which one walks; a story of a building
examples: Please sit down on the floor.
My flat is on the third floor.

meaning_th: ดอกไม้
meaning_en: the seed-bearing part of a plant, consisting of reproductive organs that are typically surrounded by a brightly colored corolla
examples: The beautiful flowers in the garden smell nice.

meaning_th: บิน
meaning_en: move through the air using wings
examples: Birds can fly above the high buildings.

meaning_th: ตาม, ติดตาม, ปฏิบัติตาม
meaning_en: go or come after a person or thing proceeding ahead; accept as a guide or leader
examples: The little dog will follow you everywhere.
Please follow the school rules.

meaning_th: อาหาร
meaning_en: any nutritious substance that people or animals eat or drink to maintain life and growth
examples: This small cafe serves delicious and cheap food.

meaning_th: เท้า, ฟุต (หน่วยวัดความยาว)
meaning_en: the lower extremity of the leg below the ankle, on which a person stands or walks
examples: He hurt his left foot during the football match.

meaning_th: ฟุตบอล
meaning_en: a team game played with a spherical ball that may be kicked
examples: The children love playing football in the yard.

meaning_th: สำหรับ, เพื่อ, เป็นเวลา
meaning_en: affecting, with regard to, or in respect of; because of
examples: I bought this birthday gift for you.
We walked for two miles.

meaning_th: ลืม
meaning_en: fail to remember
examples: Don't forget to lock the door before leaving.

meaning_th: แบบฟอร์ม, รูปแบบ, ก่อตัว
meaning_en: a printed document with blank spaces for information; shape or configuration
examples: Please fill out this registration form.
The students form a line in the school yard.

meaning_th: สี่สิบ
meaning_en: the numerical product of ten and four
examples: This English dictionary costs forty dollars.

meaning_th: สี่, เลขสี่
meaning_en: one more than three; two less than six
examples: There are four chairs around the dining table.

meaning_th: สิบสี่
meaning_en: one more than thirteen; six less than twenty
examples: My cousin is fourteen years old.

meaning_th: ที่สี่, ลำดับที่สี่
meaning_en: constituting number four in a sequence
examples: April is the fourth month of the year.

meaning_th: ฟรี, วาง, อิสระ
meaning_en: given or available without charge; not occupied
examples: The local museum offers free tickets on Sundays.
Are you free this Friday evening?

meaning_th: วันศุกร์
meaning_en: the day of the week before Saturday and after Thursday
examples: We are going to a concert this Friday night.

meaning_th: เพื่อน
meaning_en: a person whom one knows and has a bond of mutual affection with
examples: He is driving a car with his best friend.

meaning_th: เป็นมิตร, เป็นกันเอง
meaning_en: kind and pleasant
examples: Don't be afraid of the dog; it's very friendly.

meaning_th: จาก, ตั้งแต่
meaning_en: indicating the point in space or time at which a journey, motion, or action starts
examples: Where are you from? I'm from Thailand.

meaning_th: ข้างหน้า, ด้านหน้า
meaning_en: the side or part of an object that presents itself to view or that is normally ahead
examples: Please write your name on the front page of the booklet.

meaning_th: ผลไม้
meaning_en: the sweet and fleshy product of a tree or other plant that contains seed and can be eaten as food
examples: She loves eating fresh fruit like apples and bananas.

meaning_th: เต็ม, อิ่ม
meaning_en: containing or holding as much or as many as possible; having eaten to satisfaction
examples: The bottle is full of fresh water.
No more chocolate cake for me, I'm full.

meaning_th: ความสนุกสนาน, เรื่องน่าสนุก
meaning_en: enjoyment, amusement, or lighthearted pleasure
examples: Camping with friends is always great fun.

meaning_th: ตลก, น่าขบขัน
meaning_en: causing laughter or amusement; humorous
examples: He told a very funny story that made everyone laugh.

meaning_th: อนาคต
meaning_en: the time or a period of time following the moment of speaking or writing
examples: He wants to become a famous doctor in the future.

meaning_th: เกม, การแข่งขันกีฬา
meaning_en: an activity or sport pursued for amusement or exercise
examples: The children are playing a board game in the room.

meaning_th: สวน, สวนดอกไม้
meaning_en: a piece of ground, adjoining a house, used for growing flowers, fruit, or vegetables
examples: There are beautiful flowers in our front garden.

meaning_th: ภูมิศาสตร์
meaning_en: the study of the physical features of the earth and its atmosphere
pronounce_th: จีอ็อกแกรฟี
examples: Geography is my favourite subject at school.

meaning_th: ได้รับ, ไปเอามา, เข้าใจ
meaning_en: come to have or hold something; receive; fetch
examples: Can you go outside and get some fresh air?
I get an email from my manager every Monday.

meaning_th: เด็กผู้หญิง
meaning_en: a female child or youth
examples: The little girl is drawing pictures of birds.

meaning_th: แฟนสาว, เพื่อนหญิง
meaning_en: a regular female companion with whom a person has a romantic relationship
pronounce_th: เกิร์ลเฟรนด์
examples: He went to the cinema with his girlfriend.

meaning_th: ให้, มอบให้
meaning_en: provide love, a thing, or care to someone
examples: Can you give me that book, please?

meaning_th: ดีใจ, ยินดี
meaning_en: feeling pleasure or happiness
examples: I am so glad to hear that you passed the exam.

meaning_th: แก้วน้ำ, กระจก, แว่นตา
meaning_en: a hard, brittle substance, typically transparent; a container for drinking
examples: He drank a glass of fresh water.

meaning_th: ไป, เดินทางไป
meaning_en: move from one place to another
examples: I go to the office by bus every morning.

meaning_th: ดี, เก่ง
meaning_en: of a high standard; right or proper
examples: She is a very good student.

meaning_th: ลาก่อน, สวัสดี (ตอนลา)
meaning_en: used to express good wishes when parting
examples: He said goodbye to his family at the airport.

meaning_th: ปู่, ตา
meaning_en: the father of one's father or mother
pronounce_th: แกรนด์ฟาร์เธอะ
examples: My grandfather is eighty years old.

meaning_th: ย่า, ยาย
meaning_en: the mother of one's father or mother
pronounce_th: แกรนด์มัธเธอะ
examples: My grandmother cooks delicious food for us.

meaning_th: ปู่ย่าตายาย
meaning_en: a grandparent of a person
pronounce_th: แกรนด์แพเรินท์
examples: I visit my grandparents every summer.

meaning_th: ยิ่งใหญ่, ดีมาก, ยอดเยี่ยม
meaning_en: of an extent, amount, or intensity considerably above the normal or average
examples: We had a great time at the rock concert.

meaning_th: สีเขียว
meaning_en: of the color between blue and yellow in the spectrum; colored like grass
examples: The trees turn green in spring.

meaning_th: สีเทา
meaning_en: of a color intermediate between black and white
examples: The sky is grey and cloudy today.

meaning_th: กลุ่ม, หมวดหมู่
meaning_en: a number of people or things that are located, gathered, or classed together
examples: A small group of students is waiting outside.

meaning_th: เติบโต, ปลูก, ขยายตัว
meaning_en: undergo natural development by increasing in size and changing physically
examples: The local farmer wants to grow organic carrots.

meaning_th: เดา, คาดเดา
meaning_en: estimate or suppose something without sufficient information to be sure
examples: Can you guess the answer to this question?

meaning_th: กีตาร์
meaning_en: a stringed musical instrument, with six or twelve strings, played by plucking or strumming
examples: He plays guitar in a famous rock band.

meaning_th: โรงยิม, สถานที่ออกกำลังกาย
meaning_en: a room or building equipped for gymnastics, games, and other physical exercise
examples: I go to the gym three times a week.

meaning_th: ผม, ขน
meaning_en: any of the fine thread-like strands that grow from the skin of humans and other mammals
examples: She has long blonde hair and blue eyes.

meaning_th: ครึ่ง, ครึ่งหนึ่ง
meaning_en: either of two equal or corresponding parts into which something is or can be divided
examples: Please cut the red apple in half.

meaning_th: มือ, ยื่นให้
meaning_en: the end part of a person's arm beyond the wrist
examples: Wash your hands before having breakfast.

meaning_th: เกิดขึ้น
meaning_en: take place; occur
examples: What will happen if we arrive late?

meaning_th: มีความสุข
meaning_en: feeling or showing pleasure or contentment
examples: I am very happy to meet you today.

meaning_th: ยาก, แข็ง, รุนแรง, ขยัน
meaning_en: solid, firm, and rigid; difficult to understand or do; with a great deal of effort
examples: The final exam was very hard.
He works hard at the office every day.

meaning_th: หมวก
meaning_en: a shaped covering for the head worn for warmth, as a fashion item, or as part of a uniform
examples: He wore a black hat to protect his face from the sun.

meaning_th: มี, รับประทาน (ใช้เป็นกริยาช่วย)
meaning_en: possess, own, or hold; consume
examples: I have a big house in Bangkok.
What time do you have breakfast?

meaning_th: เขา (สรรพนามบุรุษที่ 3 เพศชาย)
meaning_en: used to refer to a male person that has already been mentioned
examples: He is a Senior Quality Assurance Engineer.

meaning_th: ศีรษะ, หัวหน้า, มุ่งหน้าไป
meaning_en: the upper part of the human body; the person in charge
examples: He wears a black hat on his head.

meaning_th: สุขภาพ, ร่างกาย
meaning_en: the state of being free from illness or injury
examples: Exercise is very important for your health.

meaning_th: แข็งแรง, ดีต่อสุขภาพ
meaning_en: in a good physical or mental condition; beneficial to health
examples: Eating fresh fruit and vegetables is a healthy habit.

meaning_th: ได้ยิน, รับรู้
meaning_en: perceive with the ear the sound made by someone or something
examples: Did you hear that strange noise outside?

meaning_th: สวัสดี
meaning_en: used as a greeting or to begin a telephone conversation
examples: Hello! How are you doing today?

meaning_th: ช่วยเหลือ, ความช่วยเหลือ
meaning_en: make it easier for someone to do something by offering one's services or resources
examples: Could you help me carry these heavy bags?
Thank you for your help.

meaning_th: หล่อน, ของหล่อน (สรรพนามผู้หญิง)
meaning_en: used as the object of a verb or preposition to refer to a female person; belonging to a female
examples: I saw her at the cafe down the street.
This is her book.

meaning_th: ที่นี่, ตรงนี้
meaning_en: in, at, or to this place or position
examples: Please sign your name right here.

meaning_th: สูง
meaning_en: extending above the normal level or surface; great in amount or intensity
examples: The birds are flying above the high buildings.

meaning_th: เขา (สรรพนามผู้ชาย ในฐานะกรรม)
meaning_en: used as the object of a verb or preposition to refer to a male person
examples: I met him at the office yesterday afternoon.

meaning_th: ของเขา (ผู้ชาย)
meaning_en: belonging to or associated with a male person
examples: He broke his left arm during the match.
This red car is his.

meaning_th: ประวัติศาสตร์
meaning_en: the study of past events, particularly in human affairs
examples: She loves painting and art history.

meaning_th: งานอดิเรก
meaning_en: an activity done regularly in one's leisure time for pleasure
examples: Cooking and photography are my favorite hobbies.

meaning_th: วันหยุด, เทศกาลวันหยุด
meaning_en: a day of festivity or recreation when no work is done
examples: I hope you enjoy your winter holiday trip.
